feature: Add a new product category with a name and a 1:1 ratio image in multiple languages (Default, English, Arabic)
outcome: The category is created and appears in the master category list, enabling products to be assigned to it
setupComments: Multilingual name fields (Default / EN / AR) and image upload required
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Category → Fill Name (Default/EN/AR) → Upload 1:1 image → Save
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Category → Fill Name (Default/EN/AR) → Upload 1:1 image → Save

feature: View the full category list with search and export controls
outcome: I can quickly locate any category and export the list to Excel for audit purposes
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Category → View list → Use Search / Export
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Category → View list → Use Search / Export

feature: Edit an existing category's name or image
outcome: Category information stays accurate without having to delete and recreate entries
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Category → View list → Click Edit icon → Update → Save
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Category → View list → Click Edit icon → Update → Save

feature: Enable or disable a category using a status toggle
outcome: Hidden categories stop appearing in all product assignment dropdowns and customer storefronts instantly
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Category → View list → Toggle Status switch
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Category → View list → Toggle Status switch

feature: Delete a category that has no linked products
outcome: Stale or test categories are removed, keeping the catalogue clean
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Category → View list → Click Delete icon → Confirm
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Category → View list → Click Delete icon → Confirm

feature: Add a new sub-category by selecting a parent main category and entering a name in all supported languages
outcome: Products can be nested under a main category for finer classification, improving shopability
setupComments: Parent category must exist before creating sub-category
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Sub Category → Select parent category → Enter name → Save
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Sub Category → Select parent category → Enter name → Save

feature: View the sub-category list showing each sub-category alongside its parent category
outcome: I can verify the correct parent-child relationships at a glance
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Sub Category → View list
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Sub Category → View list

feature: Edit a sub-category's name or reassign it to a different parent category
outcome: Mis-classified sub-categories can be corrected without data loss
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Sub Category → View list → Click Edit icon → Update → Save
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Sub Category → View list → Click Edit icon → Update → Save

feature: Download the official category bulk-import Excel template (with or without current data)
outcome: I have a correctly formatted file to fill in, preventing import errors
setupComments: Template must be .xls or .xlsx format
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Bulk Import → Download template → Fill → Upload
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Bulk Import → Download template → Fill → Upload

feature: Upload a completed Excel file to import multiple new categories at once
outcome: Onboarding large category structures is done in minutes instead of hours of manual entry
setupComments: Upload New Data option selected
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Bulk Import → Download template → Fill data → Upload New Data
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Bulk Import → Download template → Fill data → Upload New Data

feature: Upload a completed Excel file to update existing category records in bulk
outcome: Mass corrections to names, images, or status are applied without editing each record individually
setupComments: Update Existing Data option selected
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Bulk Import → Download template → Fill data → Update Existing Data
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Bulk Import → Download template → Fill data → Update Existing Data

feature: Export the full category and sub-category list as an Excel file with optional sort/filter options
outcome: I have an offline backup or a starting-point file for preparing the next bulk import
navigation: Product Management → Categories → Bulk Export → Select type → Export
navigationPath: Product Management → Categories → Bulk Export → Select type → Export

feature: Add a new product attribute (e.g., Colour, Material, Finish) with multilingual name support
outcome: Descriptive characteristics can be attached to products, enriching customer-facing detail pages
navigation: Product Management → Attributes → Fill attribute name → Save
navigationPath: Product Management → Attributes → Fill attribute name → Save

feature: View all attributes in a list and edit or delete individual attributes
outcome: The attribute dictionary stays current as product lines evolve
navigation: Product Management → Attributes → View list → Edit or Delete
navigationPath: Product Management → Attributes → View list → Edit or Delete

feature: Add a new unit of measurement (e.g., kg, piece, metre, litre) with multilingual name support
outcome: Products can specify the correct selling unit, avoiding customer confusion
navigation: Product Management → Units → Fill unit name → Save
navigationPath: Product Management → Units → Fill unit name → Save

feature: View the units list and edit or delete entries
outcome: Outdated or duplicate units are removed, ensuring only valid options appear in product forms
navigation: Product Management → Units → View list → Edit or Delete
navigationPath: Product Management → Units → View list → Edit or Delete

feature: Add a new brand with a name and an uploaded brand logo
outcome: Products can be associated with a recognisable brand, building customer trust
navigation: Product Management → Brands → Add New Brand → Enter name → Upload logo → Set status → Save
navigationPath: Product Management → Brands → Add New Brand → Enter name → Upload logo → Set status → Save

feature: Enable or disable a brand using a status toggle
outcome: Discontinued brands are hidden from product forms without losing historical data
navigation: Product Management → Brands → View list → Toggle Status / Edit / Delete
navigationPath: Product Management → Brands → View list → Toggle Status / Edit / Delete

feature: View and search the full brand list
outcome: I can quickly find any brand in a growing catalogue without scrolling

navigationPath: Product Management → Brands → View brand list → Use search bar

feature: Enter product name, short description, and long description in Default, English, and Arabic
outcome: The product page is fully localised for all supported customer markets

navigationPath: Product Setup → Add New → Fill Name, Short Desc, Long Desc in all language tabs

feature: Upload a full-size 1:1 product image and a required thumbnail image
outcome: Customers see a high-quality visual and the thumbnail renders correctly in listing grids
setupComments: Thumbnail is mandatory; full image is recommended. Max 100KB, .jpg or .png
navigation: Product Setup → Add New → Upload Product Image (1:1) → Upload Thumbnail
navigationPath: Product Setup → Add New → Upload Product Image (1:1) → Upload Thumbnail

feature: Assign the product to a store, category, sub-category, and brand
outcome: The product appears in the correct storefront, category page, and brand filter
setupComments: Category, Sub-Category and Brand must exist in admin panel BEFORE product can be added
navigation: Product Setup → Add New → Select Store → Category → Sub-Category → Brand
navigationPath: Product Setup → Add New → Select Store → Category → Sub-Category → Brand

feature: Select the unit of measurement and set a maximum purchase quantity limit per order
outcome: Customers buy the correct measured unit and bulk purchases beyond the limit are blocked at checkout
navigation: Product Setup → Add New → Enter Price → Enter Stock → Set Discount %
navigationPath: Product Setup → Add New → Enter Price → Enter Stock → Set Discount %

feature: Set the product price, current stock quantity, and a discount percentage
outcome: The price, discounted price, and remaining stock are displayed accurately on the customer app
navigation: Product Setup → Add New → Select Unit of Measurement → Set Max Purchase Quantity
navigationPath: Product Setup → Add New → Select Unit of Measurement → Set Max Purchase Quantity

feature: Add product attributes and fill in the variant price/stock table for each combination
outcome: Customers can choose a variant (e.g., size or colour) and the correct price and stock are shown
navigation: Product Setup → Add New → Attributes section → Add values → Fill variant table
navigationPath: Product Setup → Add New → Attributes section → Add values → Fill variant table

feature: Import product information from the platform gallery to pre-fill image fields
outcome: Reusing existing gallery assets avoids duplicate uploads and speeds up listing
setupComments: Add Info From Gallery feature
navigation: Product Setup → Add New → Tags section → Enter and add keywords
navigationPath: Product Setup → Add New → Tags section → Enter and add keywords

feature: Add searchable keyword tags to the product
outcome: Customers find the product through relevant search terms on the customer app
navigation: Product Setup → Add New → Tags section → Enter keywords → Add
navigationPath: Product Setup → Add New → Tags section → Enter keywords → Add

feature: View the complete product list with search, filter by category/status/store/zone, and paginate results
outcome: I can find any product instantly even with thousands of SKUs
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → List → Use search / filter dropdowns
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → List → Use search / filter dropdowns

feature: Edit any field of an existing product directly from the list view
outcome: Corrections to price, stock, descriptions, or images are applied without re-creating the listing
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → List → Click Edit icon → Make changes → Save
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → List → Click Edit icon → Make changes → Save

feature: Enable or disable a product using the status toggle
outcome: Out-of-season or out-of-stock products are hidden from customers without permanent deletion
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → List → Toggle Status switch
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → List → Toggle Status switch

feature: Delete a product permanently from the catalogue
outcome: Discontinued SKUs are removed cleanly, freeing up catalogue space
setupComments: Action is irreversible
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → List → Click Delete icon → Confirm
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → List → Click Delete icon → Confirm

feature: View a filtered list of all products whose stock is at or below threshold, filter by zone or store
outcome: I can prioritise reordering before products go out of stock and cause lost sales
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → Low Stock List
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → Low Stock List

feature: Update the stock quantity of a low-stock product directly from the low-stock list
outcome: I can top up inventory without navigating through the full product editor
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → Low Stock List → Click Edit on product → Update Stock → Save
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → Low Stock List → Click Edit on product → Update Stock → Save

feature: View all customer reviews submitted for products, including rating, comment, and reviewer name
outcome: I have visibility over product satisfaction across the entire catalogue
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → Review → View list
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → Review → View list

feature: Delete an inappropriate or fraudulent product review
outcome: Fake or abusive reviews are removed before they damage product reputation
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → Review → Click Delete on review
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → Review → Click Delete on review

feature: Download the product bulk-import Excel template pre-filled with existing product data
outcome: I can use the exported file as a base for updates rather than starting from scratch
setupComments: Category, Sub-Category, Brand must exist before importing products
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → Bulk Import → Download template → Upload
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → Bulk Import → Download template → Upload

feature: Import a filled Excel file to add hundreds of new products in a single operation
outcome: Mass product onboarding is completed in minutes with zero manual form filling
setupComments: Only .xls/.xlsx accepted; image file names must not exceed 30 characters
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → Bulk Import → Download template → Fill data → Upload New Data
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → Bulk Import → Download template → Fill data → Upload New Data

feature: Export the full product catalogue to Excel for reporting, backup, or external sharing
outcome: I always have an up-to-date offline copy of the product database for compliance or handover
navigation: Product Management → Product Setup → Bulk Export → Select type → Export
navigationPath: Product Management → Product Setup → Bulk Export → Select type → Export

feature: Draw a new operational zone boundary on the interactive Google Map and name it in multiple languages
outcome: A precise geographic service area is defined so stores and deliveries can be restricted to that region
setupComments: Both polygon drawing and zone name are mandatory
navigation: Settings → Zone Setup → Fill Business Zone Name → Draw boundary on Google Map → Submit
navigationPath: Settings → Zone Setup → Fill Business Zone Name → Draw boundary on Google Map → Submit

feature: View, search, and export all existing zones in the zone management list
outcome: I have a clear overview of every service region and can audit them at any time
navigation: Settings → Zone Setup → Scroll to Zone List → Search Business Zone field → Export
navigationPath: Settings → Zone Setup → Scroll to Zone List → Search Business Zone field → Export

feature: Enable or disable an entire zone using the master status toggle
outcome: All storefronts, deliveries, and customer access in a problematic region can be suspended instantly
setupComments: Disabling a zone removes it from the customer app in real time
navigation: Settings → Zone Setup → Zone List → Toggle Status to Disable/Enable
navigationPath: Settings → Zone Setup → Zone List → Toggle Status to Disable/Enable

feature: Connect a business module to a zone using the grid action icon
outcome: The zone starts offering the selected type of services (e.g., eCommerce) to customers in that area
setupComments: A zone without a connected module offers no services
navigation: Settings → Zone Setup → Zone List → Click grid/Connect Module icon → Select and connect module
navigationPath: Settings → Zone Setup → Zone List → Click grid/Connect Module icon → Select and connect module

feature: Edit the drawn boundary polygon of an existing zone or delete obsolete zones via the three-dot menu
outcome: Service area adjustments are reflected immediately without recreating the zone from scratch
navigation: Settings → Zone Setup → Zone List → Click three-dot menu → Edit boundary or Delete
navigationPath: Settings → Zone Setup → Zone List → Click three-dot menu → Edit boundary or Delete

feature: Create a new business module type (Grocery, Food, Pharmacy, eCommerce, Parcel) with name, description, icon, and thumbnail
outcome: A new vertical is available for stores to register under and for customers to browse on the home screen
setupComments: Module type cannot be changed after creation
navigation: Settings → Module Setup → Add Business Module → Fill Basic Setup → Select Module Type → Upload Icon + Thumbnail → Add Module
navigationPath: Settings → Module Setup → Add Business Module → Fill Basic Setup → Select Module Type → Upload Icon + Thumbnail → Add Module

feature: Filter the module list by module type and search by name; export the module list

navigation: Settings → Module Setup → Modules → Filter by All module type → Use search bar
navigationPath: Settings → Module Setup → Modules → Filter by All module type → Use search bar

feature: Enable or disable a business module to control its visibility on the customer app home screen
outcome: A module under maintenance or review is hidden until it is ready
setupComments: Disabling hides all stores under this module
navigation: Settings → Module Setup → Modules → Toggle Status switch
navigationPath: Settings → Module Setup → Modules → Toggle Status switch

feature: Edit a module's name, description, icon, or thumbnail after initial creation
outcome: Branding and descriptions stay accurate as the business evolves without recreating the module
navigation: Settings → Module Setup → Modules → Click pencil Edit icon → Update fields → Save
navigationPath: Settings → Module Setup → Modules → Click pencil Edit icon → Update fields → Save

feature: Set global company name, email, phone, country, address, and map coordinates as platform defaults
outcome: All receipts, emails, and the customer app default map reflect the correct company identity
setupComments: Latitude and longitude set the default map centre for new users
navigation: Settings → Business Settings → Business Information tab → Fill Company Name, Email, Phone, Country, Address → Click map to set coordinates → Upload Logo + Favicon → Save
navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Business Information tab → Fill Company Name, Email, Phone, Country, Address → Click map to set coordinates → Upload Logo + Favicon → Save

feature: Upload the platform logo (3:1 ratio) and favicon (1:1 ratio)
outcome: The brand identity is consistently displayed across the admin dashboard, web portal, and browser tabs
navigation: Settings → Business Settings → Business Information → General Settings section → Update fields → Save
navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Business Information → General Settings section → Update fields → Save

feature: Configure time zone, time format, currency symbol, currency position, decimal precision, copyright, and cookies text
outcome: All financial figures, order timestamps, and footer text reflect the correct local standards
setupComments: Currency and decimal changes affect all displayed prices immediately
navigation: Settings → Business Settings → Business Information → Toggle Maintenance Mode ON
navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Business Information → Toggle Maintenance Mode ON

feature: Activate Maintenance Mode to disable all customer-facing apps and APIs during critical updates
outcome: Customers see a maintenance screen and cannot place orders during planned downtime, protecting data integrity
setupComments: Only Admin panel remains accessible in maintenance mode
navigation: Settings → Business Settings → Business Information → Toggle Maintenance Mode ON
navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Business Information → Toggle Maintenance Mode ON

feature: Enable or disable vendor self-registration, configure order cancellation, product approval, review replies, and cash-in-hand limits
outcome: All vendor operational policies are enforced consistently from a single settings page
setupComments: Product approval scope: Add new / Update price / Update details
navigation: Settings → Business Settings → Vendor tab → Configure toggles and fields → Save Information
navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Vendor tab → Configure toggles and fields → Save Information

feature: Configure driver settings: tips, earnings display, self-registration, maximum orders, delivery photo proof, and cash-in-hand overflow
outcome: Fleet policies are enforced consistently and drivers cannot accept more jobs than they can safely handle
setupComments: Photo proof requires driver to upload an image before marking order Delivered
navigation: Settings → Business Settings → Deliveryman tab → Configure fields → Save Information
navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Deliveryman tab → Configure fields → Save Information

feature: Configure customer wallet, referral program, refund to wallet, loyalty points earning rate, and minimum redemption threshold
outcome: Customers are rewarded for loyalty and referrals, and all wallet features are centrally managed
setupComments: Example: 2% earn rate, 100 points = 1 BHD, minimum 500 points to redeem
navigation: Settings → Business Settings → Customers tab → Configure all toggles and fields → Save
navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Customers tab → Configure all toggles and fields → Save

feature: Enable or disable the global refund request feature and manage the list of refund reason options
outcome: Refund data is categorised accurately for analytics and only open when operational capacity allows
setupComments: Examples: Damaged item, Missing item, Wrong order
navigation: Settings → Business Settings → Refund Settings tab → Toggle Refund Request Mode → Add Refund Reason → Add Now
navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Refund Settings tab → Toggle Refund Request Mode → Add Refund Reason → Add Now

feature: Add a new platform language with ISO code and text direction (LTR or RTL), and set the default language
outcome: The platform is accessible in a new language market and first-time visitors see the most appropriate language
setupComments: RTL setting flips the entire app UI for Arabic/Hebrew
navigation: Settings → Business Settings → Languages tab → View list with en/ar → Add New Language or toggle Status/Default
navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Languages tab → View list with en/ar → Add New Language or toggle Status/Default

feature: Create a new tax type with name and percentage rate, and configure inclusive/exclusive calculation method

navigationPath: Settings → System Tax → Create Taxes → Click Create Tax → Enter name and rate → Submit

setupComments: Features: POS, self-delivery, app access, reviews, chat
navigation: Settings → Subscription Management → Subscription Package → Fill Package Information → Check features → Save
navigationPath: Settings → Subscription Management → Subscription Package → Fill Package Information → Check features → Save

feature: Configure free trial period, deadline warning message, and return money restriction threshold

navigationPath: Settings → Subscription Management → Settings → Configure Free Trial and Deadline Warning → Submit

navigationPath: Settings → Pages & Social Media → Social Media → Select platform → Enter link → Save

navigationPath: Settings → Pages & Social Media → Business Pages → Terms And Condition → Edit in CKEditor → Submit

navigationPath: Settings → Pages & Social Media → React Landing Page → Edit tab sections → Save Information

navigationPath: Settings → Gallery → Browse Local Storage → Open any named folder

navigationPath: Settings → Gallery → Open folder → Click Add New → Choose file(s) → Upload

navigationPath: Settings → Gallery → Open folder (e.g. Category 73 items) → Click image → View Preview Modal

navigationPath: Settings → Business Settings → Websocket tab → Toggle Websocket ON → Enter URL and Port → Save Information

navigationPath: Store Management → New Store → View New Joining Requests (Pending / Denied tabs)

navigationPath: Store Management → New Store → Click action icon on request → Approve or Deny

navigationPath: Store Management → Bulk Export → Select data type → Click Export

navigationPath: POS Section → New Sale → Select Store → Select Category → Search product → Click to add to cart

navigationPath: Order Management → Orders → Click status category in sidebar

navigationPath: Order Management → Orders → Click status tab in sidebar (Scheduled / Pending / Accepted / Processing / On The Way / Delivered / Cancelled / Payment Failed / Refunded)

navigationPath: Order Management → Orders → Click Eye Icon → View all detail sections

navigationPath: Order Management → Orders → Eye Icon → Edit → Update Status / Assign Delivery Man

navigationPath: Order Management → Orders → Click Printer Icon on order row

navigationPath: Order Management → Offline Payments → Review tabs

feature: Update an offline payment status to Verified or Denied after reviewing the customer's uploaded proof

navigationPath: Order Management → Offline Payments → Review proof → Update status to Verified or Denied

navigationPath: Order Management → Order Refunds → Review request → Click Approve or Rejected

navigationPath: Promotion Management → Flash Sales → Fill Title, Admin Discount %, Store Discount %, Start Date, End Date → Submit

feature: Add products to an existing flash sale by selecting the item, setting the sale stock quantity, and setting the discount percentage
outcome: Only the specified products appear at their discounted price during the flash sale window

navigationPath: Promotion Management → Flash Sales → Click Add Products → Select Item → Set Stock & Discount → Save

feature: Publish, edit, or delete flash sales from the Flash Sale List using the toggle and action icons
outcome: I can control exactly which flash sales are visible to customers and adjust or remove them as needed
setupComments: Toggle Publish controls customer visibility without deleting the sale
navigation: Promotion Management → Flash Sales → View list → Toggle Publish / Click Edit or Delete
navigationPath: Promotion Management → Flash Sales → View list → Toggle Publish / Click Edit or Delete

navigationPath: Promotion Management → Coupons → Fill all coupon fields → Save

navigationPath: Promotion Management → Advertisements → Ad Requests → Review tabs (New/Update/Denied) → Approve or Deny

navigationPath: Reports & Analytics → Transaction Report → View table → Export

navigationPath: Reports & Analytics → Item Report → Apply filters → View table → Export

navigationPath: Reports & Analytics → Store Wise Report → View Summary / Sales / Order sections

navigationPath: Reports & Analytics → Expense Report → Apply filters → View table → Export

navigationPath: Reports & Analytics → Disbursement Report → Select Store or Delivery Man tab → Apply filters

navigationPath: Reports & Analytics → Order Report → Apply filters → View stats and table → Export

navigationPath: Reports & Analytics → Vendor Tax Report → Select filter → Click Filter → View results

navigationPath: Financial Operations → Collect Cash → Enter amount, payment method, reference → Save

feature: View the complete cash collection log to reconcile physical cash held against digital records

navigation: Transactions & Reports → Business Management → Collect Cash → View collection log
navigationPath: Financial Operations → Collect Cash → View collection log

navigationPath: Financial Operations → Delivery Man Payments → Enter driver, amount, type → Save

outcome: Vendors and drivers provide the exact information needed for payout processing, reducing failed transfers

navigationPath: Financial Operations → Withdraw Method → Add method → Define required fields → Save

feature: Enable, disable, or set a withdrawal method as the default for new requests

navigationPath: Financial Operations → Withdraw Method → Toggle Enable/Disable → Click Set as Default
